features.name: action_moves_closer_to_target
features.source:
def f21(s, a):
    rx, ry = s[0], s[1]
    tx, ty = s[9], s[10]
    dx, dy = a[0], a[1]
    dist_before = math.sqrt((rx - tx)**2 + (ry - ty)**2)
    dist_after = math.sqrt((rx + dx - tx)**2 + (ry + dy - ty)**2)
    return dist_after < dist_before

features.name: action_moves_away_to_target
features.source:
def f22(s, a):
    rx, ry = s[0], s[1]
    tx, ty = s[9], s[10]
    dx, dy = a[0], a[1]
    dist_before = math.sqrt((rx - tx)**2 + (ry - ty)**2)
    dist_after = math.sqrt((rx + dx - tx)**2 + (ry + dy - ty)**2)
    return dist_after > dist_before

features.name: action_strongly_toward_target
features.source:
def f23(s, a):
    rx, ry = s[0], s[1]
    tx, ty = s[9], s[10]
    dx, dy = a[0], a[1]
    vecx, vecy = tx - rx, ty - ry
    norm_vec = math.sqrt(vecx**2 + vecy**2)
    norm_a = math.sqrt(dx**2 + dy**2)
    if norm_vec < 1e-6 or norm_a < 1e-6:
        return False
    cos_sim = (vecx*dx + vecy*dy) / (norm_vec * norm_a)
    return cos_sim > 0.7

features.name: action_weakly_toward_target
features.source:
def f24(s, a):
    rx, ry = s[0], s[1]
    tx, ty = s[9], s[10]
    dx, dy = a[0], a[1]
    vecx, vecy = tx - rx, ty - ry
    norm_vec = math.sqrt(vecx**2 + vecy**2)
    norm_a = math.sqrt(dx**2 + dy**2)
    if norm_vec < 1e-6 or norm_a < 1e-6:
        return False
    cos_sim = (vecx*dx + vecy*dy) / (norm_vec * norm_a)
    return cos_sim > 0.3

    return math.sqrt(a[0]**2 + a[1]**2) < 0.05

features.name: robot_intersects_target
features.source:
def f63(s, a):
    rx, ry, rr = s[0], s[1], s[3]
    tx, ty, tw, th = s[9], s[10], s[17], s[18]
    dx = abs(rx - tx)
    dy = abs(ry - ty)
    if dx > (tw/2 + rr) or dy > (th/2 + rr):
        return False
    if dx <= (tw/2) or dy <= (th/2):
        return True
    corner_dist_sq = (dx - tw/2)**2 + (dy - th/2)**2
    return corner_dist_sq <= rr**2

features.name: robot_target_overlap_x
features.source:
def f64(s, a):
    return abs(s[0] - s[9]) < (s[3] + s[17]/2)

features.name: action_toward_target_x
features.source:
def f73(s, a):
    rx, tx = s[0], s[9]
    delta = tx - rx
    return (a[0] > 0) == (delta > 0) and abs(a[0]) > 1e-3

features.name: action_away_from_target_x
features.source:
def f74(s, a):
    rx, tx = s[0], s[9]
    delta = tx - rx
    return (a[0] < 0) == (delta > 0) and abs(a[0]) > 1e-3

features.name: action_toward_target_y
features.source:
def f75(s, a):
    rx, tx = s[1], s[10]
    delta = tx - rx
    return (a[1] > 0) == (delta > 0) and abs(a[1]) > 1e-3

features.name: action_away_from_target_y
features.source:
def f76(s, a):
    rx, tx = s[1], s[10]
    delta = tx - rx
    return (a[1] < 0) == (delta > 0) and abs(a[1]) > 1e-3

features.name: action_stationary
features.source:
def f77(s, a):
    return abs(a[0]) < 1e-3 and abs(a[1]) < 1e-3

features.name: action_diagonal_nonzero
features.source:
def f78(s, a):
    return abs(a[0]) > 1e-3 and abs(a[1]) > 1e-3

features.name: gripper_above_target
features.source:
def f84(s, a):
    return s[7] > s[10]

features.name: gripper_below_target
features.source:
def f85(s, a):
    return s[7] < s[10]

features.name: robot_target_orientation_aligned
features.source:
def f86(s, a):
    return abs(s[2] - s[11]) < 0.2

features.name: robot_target_orientation_opposite
features.source:
def f87(s, a):
    return abs(abs(s[2] - s[11]) - math.pi) < 0.2

features.name: action_pure_rotation
features.source:
def f88(s, a):
    return abs(a[2]) > 1e-3 and abs(a[0]) < 1e-3 and abs(a[1]) < 1e-3

features.name: action_pure_translation
features.source:
def f89(s, a):
    return abs(a[2]) < 1e-3 and (abs(a[0]) > 1e-3 or abs(a[1]) > 1e-3)

features.name: action_pure_arm
features.source:
def f90(s, a):
    return abs(a[3]) > 1e-3 and abs(a[0]) < 1e-3 and abs(a[1]) < 1e-3 and abs(a[2]) < 1e-3

features.name: action_pure_vacuum
features.source:
def f91(s, a):
    return abs(a[4]) > 1e-3 and abs(a[0]) < 1e-3 and abs(a[1]) < 1e-3 and abs(a[2]) < 1e-3 and abs(a[3]) < 1e-3

features.name: action_composite
